name: Coquilles St. Jacques
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 375°F.
2 In a large skillet, combine scallops with wine, mushrooms, and bay leaf. Bring to a boil; cover and simmer for 2 minutes. Remove pan from heat.
3 Melt butter in a saucepan. Blend in flour, stirring until smooth. Add cream; cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until sauce thickens.
4 Add parsley, pepper, and sherry. Stir scallop mixture into cream sauce.
5 Spoon the mixture into 4 small ramekins (small baking dishes). Cover with foil and bake for 15 minutes.
6 Uncover and bake for 5 more minutes, or until sauce bubbles. Remove scallops from oven. Sprinkle with paprika and serve.
Makes 4 servings.
